tracks.meaning: a series of actions or operations performed by a computer or program to accomplish a task
a series of steps or actions taken to achieve a particular result or goal
a method or procedure used in manufacturing or service delivery
a legal proceeding or series of actions taken within the judicial system
a series of unconscious mental operations or cognitive steps
a series of natural operations or functions occurring in living organisms
a series of chemical reactions or transformations
a systematic sequence of operations in software or hardware execution
to communicate or convey information through a series of interactions
the duration or progression of events from beginning to completion
to treat or deal with someone or something in a particular way
a series of medical procedures or therapeutic steps to treat a condition
a method or technique used in the production of printed materials
a series of agricultural operations or procedures for crop production
a series of operations used to refine or treat metals
